title: The Storm
description: Explore a vast, flourishing open world whilst being chased down by the fearsome wither storm
body:
Whilst being chased down by the Wither Storm, you will explore enhanced terrain thanks to:
Terralith (with great mountains and lush forests)
Nullscape (for a more interesting and vertical end dimension)
Incendium (for a refreshed set of nether biomes. 
You will always know your place in this vast world thanks to Xaero's World map and Minimap.
As you will be constantly on the run, sleep may become difficult, so I've added Comforts so that you can have a quick nap and then move on

Have fun 😄
